hotels.name: The Jabberwock Bed & Breakfast
hotels.description_fr:
L’établissement The Jabberwock Bed & Breakfast se trouve à Monterey, à respectivement 700 mètres et 1,2 km de ces lieux d’intérêt : Aeneas Beach et Presidio of Monterey Museum. Il propose une connexion Wi-Fi gratuite, un bain à remous et un jardin avec une terrasse.

Vous trouverez une salle de bains privative avec une douche dans chaque logement, tout comme des articles de toilette gratuits, un sèche-cheveux et des peignoirs.

Un service de location de vélos est disponible sur place, et vous pourrez pratiquer le vélo dans les environs.

Vous séjournerez à proximité de ces lieux d’intérêt : Cannery Row, Aquarium de la baie de Monterey et Croisières d'observation des baleines. L'aéroport le plus proche (Aéroport régional de Monterey) est à 7 km.
hotels.description_en:
Comfortable Accommodations: The Jabberwock Bed & Breakfast in Monterey offers family rooms with private bathrooms, sea or garden views, and amenities such as bathrobes, free toiletries, and a work desk.
Relaxing Facilities: Guests can enjoy a hot tub, terrace, solarium, and massage services. Free WiFi is available throughout the property, ensuring connectivity.
Dining Experience: Breakfast is served in-room, featuring freshly baked pastries, local produce, and a variety of options to suit all preferences.
Convenient Location: Located 7 km from Monterey Regional Airport, the property is close to attractions like Aeneas Beach (8-minute walk) and Monterey Bay Aquarium (less than 1 km). Surrounding activities include hiking, boating, and scuba diving.
hotels.description_es:
The Jabberwock Bed & Breakfast se encuentra en Monterrey, a 8 min a pie de Aeneas Beach y a 1,2 km de Museo del Presidio de Monterrey. Ofrece alojamiento con wifi gratis, un jardín con terraza y acceso a la bañera de hidromasaje.

Hay un baño privado con ducha en cada unidad, además de artículos de aseo gratuitos, secador de pelo y albornoces.

El bed and breakfast ofrece servicio de alquiler de bicicletas, y en los alrededores se puede practicar ciclismo.

Cerca del alojamiento hay puntos de interés como Cannery Row, Monterey Bay Aquarium y Cruceros de observación de ballenas de Monterey Bay. El aeropuerto (Aeropuerto regional de Monterrey) está a 7 km.

A las parejas les encanta la ubicación — Le han puesto un 9,9 para viajes de dos personas.
hotels.description_pt:
The Jabberwock Bed & Breakfast localiza-se em Monterey, a 8 minutos a pé de Aeneas Beach e a 1,2 km de Museu de Monterey, e fornece acomodações com acesso Wi-Fi gratuito e um jardim com um terraço, além de acesso a uma banheira de hidromassagem.

Há uma casa de banho privativa com chuveiro em cada unidade, assim como produtos de higiene pessoal gratuitos, um secador de cabelo e roupões de banho.

The Jabberwock Bed & Breakfast disponibiliza um serviço de aluguer de bicicletas, além disso os hóspedes podem usufruir de ciclismo nas proximidades.

The Jabberwock Bed & Breakfast tem vários pontos de interesse populares nas suas proximidades, incluindo Cannery Row, Aquário de Monterey Bay e Cruzeiros para observação de baleias em Monterey Bay.
hotels.description_it:
The Jabberwock Bed & Breakfast si trova a Monterey, a 700 metri da Aeneas Beach e 1,2 km da Presidio of Monterey Museum. Prevede alloggi con WiFi gratuito, un giardino con terrazza e l’accesso a una vasca idromassaggio.

In ogni alloggio troverete anche un bagno privato con doccia, oltre a set di cortesia, asciugacapelli e accappatoi.

Un servizio di noleggio biciclette è disponibile presso questo bed and breakfast, mentre nei dintorni potrete praticare il ciclismo.

I luoghi di interesse più famosi nei dintorni di The Jabberwock Bed & Breakfast includono Cannery Row, Monterey Bay Aquarium e Agenzia Crociere Monterey Bay Whale Watch. Aeroporto Regionale di Monterey si trova a 7 km di distanza.

Le coppie apprezzano molto la posizione: l'hanno valutata 9,9 per un viaggio a due.

hotels.name: Green Gables Inn, A Four Sisters Inn
hotels.description_fr:
Situé à Pacific Grove, l’établissement 3 étoiles Green Gables Inn, A Four Sisters Inn comprend un jardin. Il vous accueille à 1,1 km de ce lieu d’intérêt : Lovers Point Beach. Il est installé à respectivement 14 km, 900 mètres et 1,4 km de : Réserve d'État de Point Lobos, Aquarium de la baie de Monterey et Cannery Row. Cet établissement non-fumeurs se situe à 2,1 km de : Presidio of Monterey Museum.

Vous bénéficierez d'une salle de bains privative. Certains hébergements comprennent également un balcon et d'autres offrent une vue sur la mer.

Lors de votre séjour, vous pourrez pratiquer diverses activités à Pacific Grove et dans les environs, telles que la randonnée et le vélo.
hotels.description_en:
Comfortable Accommodations: Green Gables Inn, A Four Sisters Inn in Pacific Grove offers private bathrooms with sea views, balconies, and modern amenities. Each room includes a fireplace, tea and coffee maker, and free toiletries.
Exceptional Facilities: Guests enjoy a beautiful garden, outdoor seating area, and a tour desk. Additional services include concierge, express check-in and check-out, luggage storage, and a work desk.
Prime Location: Located a 13-minute walk from Lovers Point Beach and less than 1 km from Monterey Bay Aquarium, the inn provides easy access to local attractions. Monterey Regional Airport is 8 km away.
Activities and Surroundings: Guests can engage in hiking, cycling, boating, and scuba diving.
hotels.description_es:
Green Gables Inn, A Four Sisters Inn es un alojamiento de 3 estrellas que se encuentra en Pacific Grove, a 13 min a pie de Playa de Lovers Point, y que dispone de jardín. El alojamiento está a unos 14 km de Reserva Estatal de Point Lobos, a 10 min a pie de Monterey Bay Aquarium y a 1,4 km de Cannery Row. Este alojamiento libre de humo está a 2,1 km de Museo del Presidio de Monterrey.

Todas las habitaciones disponen de baño privado, algunas ofrecen balcón y otras también disponen de vistas al mar.

La clientela puede practicar actividades en Pacific Grove y alrededores, como senderismo y ciclismo.

Cruceros de observación de ballenas de Monterey Bay está a 2,7 km del alojamiento, y Club de golf Monterey Pines está a 2,9 km. El aeropuerto (Aeropuerto regional de Monterrey) está a 8 km.
hotels.description_pt:

O alojamento está a cerca de 14 km de Reserva Estatal Point Lobos, a menos de 1 km de Aquário de Monterey Bay e a 16 minutos a pé de Cannery Row. Este alojamento não fumador situa-se a 2,1 km de Museu de Monterey.

Os quartos estão equipados com uma casa de banho privativa, enquanto alguns quartos providenciam varanda e outros também providenciam aos hóspedes vistas do mar.

Os hóspedes de Green Gables Inn, A Four Sisters Inn poderão desfrutar de atividades em Pacific Grove e arredores, como caminhadas e ciclismo.
hotels.description_it:
Posizionato a 1,1 km da Lovers Point Beach, Green Gables Inn, A Four Sisters Inn è una struttura a 3 stelle a Pacific Grove che presenta un giardino. La struttura si trova a circa 14 km da Riserva Naturale di Point Lobos, 900 metri da Monterey Bay Aquarium e 1,4 km da Cannery Row. L'alloggio è interamente non fumatori ed è ubicato a 2,1 km da Presidio of Monterey Museum.

Le camere sono provviste di un bagno privato, mentre alcune camere nella struttura presentano un balcone e altre comprendono anche la vista sul mare.

Gli ospiti di questa locanda potranno svagarsi con varie attività a Pacific Grove e dintorni, come l’escursionismo e il ciclismo.

hotels.name: Monterey Plaza Hotel & Spa
hotels.description_fr:
Offering stunning views of Monterey Bay, a full-service spa and a private beach, the Monterey Plaza Hotel & Spa is located only steps from Cannery Row and 10 minutes' walk from the Monterey Bay Aquarium.
The guestrooms offer a seating area, air conditioning, a TV with cable channels, and an electronics charging station. The en suite bathroom includes free toiletries, bathrobes, a hairdryer, and ironing facilities. Guests can also enjoy nightly turndown service.
Monterey Plaza Hotel & Spa features a rooftop fitness centre. Guests can relax at the European Vista Blue Spa.
The Monterey Plaza Hotel & Spa features an elevated dinner restaurant, a casual all-day oceanfront restaurant, a lively lobby bar and a café.

hotels.name: Hilton Garden Inn Myrtle Beach/Coastal Grand Mall
hotels.description_fr:
Situé à Myrtle Beach, en Caroline du Sud, cet hôtel se trouve à seulement quelques minutes de la plage et du centre commercial Grand Coastal. Sur place, vous trouverez un restaurant ainsi qu'une petite épicerie ouverte 24h/24.

Le Hilton Garden Inn Myrtle Beach / Coastal Grand Mall bénéficie d'un emplacement idéal à seulement quelques pas du Broadway at the Beach et offre un accès direct à de nombreux magasins, restaurants et lieux de divertissement. Le palais des congrès Myrtle Beach se trouve également à proximité.

Pendant votre séjour au Myrtle Beach / Coastal Grand Mall Hilton Garden Inn, vous pourrez accéder aux installations de remise en forme modernes équipées d'une piscine extérieure et intérieure.
hotels.description_en:
Situated in Myrtle Beach, South Carolina, only minutes from the beach and the Coastal Grand Mall, this hotel features an on-site restaurant and a 24-hour convenience store.

The Hilton Garden Inn Myrtle Beach/Coastal Grand Mall is ideally situated only a short distance from Broadway at the Beach, offering numerous shops, restaurants and entertainment options. The Myrtle Beach Convention Center is also located nearby.

While staying at the Myrtle Beach/Coastal Grand Mall Hilton Garden Inn, guests can enjoy modern fitness facilities, complete with an outdoor lap pool and an indoor swimming pool. The hotel also offers in-room microwaves and mini-refrigerators.

Couples particularly like the location — they rated it 9.4 for a two-person trip.

El Hilton Garden Inn Myrtle Beach cuenta con un moderno gimnasio, una piscina al aire libre y una piscina cubierta. Las habitaciones del hotel también disponen de microondas y nevera.

A las parejas les encanta la ubicación — Le han puesto un 9,4 para viajes de dos personas.

hotels.description_es:
Exceptional Contemporary Retreat with 4 King Beds in Mystic CT, que tiene vistas al jardín, ofrece alojamiento con balcón y hervidor, y está a unos 21 km de Foxwoods Resort Casino. El alojamiento, que está a 6,1 km de Mystic Seaport, dispone de jardín y parking privado gratis.

Esta casa o chalet con aire acondicionado consta de 4 dormitorios, una sala de estar, una cocina totalmente equipada con nevera y cafetera, y 2 baños con ducha y artículos de aseo gratuitos. Hay toallas y ropa de cama en la casa o chalet.

Hay terraza en el propio alojamiento, y cerca se puede practicar senderismo.

Mystic Seaport Marine Museum está a 5,4 km del alojamiento, y Centro comercial Olde Mistick Village está a 8 km. El aeropuerto (Aeropuerto estatal de Westerly) está a 24 km.
hotels.description_pt:

Esta casa de férias com ar condicionado tem 4 quartos, uma sala de estar, uma cozinha totalmente equipada com frigorífico e máquina de café, e 2 casas de banho com chuveiro e produtos de higiene pessoal gratuitos. Toalhas e roupa de cama são providenciadas nesta casa de férias.

Exceptional Contemporary Retreat with 4 King Beds in Mystic CT disponibiliza um terraço no local e os hóspedes também podem usufruir de caminhadas nas proximidades.
hotels.description_it:

Situata a 6,1 km da Museo Marittimo Mystic Seaport, la struttura propone un giardino e il parcheggio privato gratuito.

Questa casa vacanze con aria condizionata comprende 4 camere da letto, un soggiorno, una cucina con utensili, frigorifero e macchina da caffè, e 2 bagni con doccia e set di cortesia. Presso questa casa vacanze troverete asciugamani e lenzuola tra i servizi disponibili.

In loco è disponibile una terrazza, mentre nelle vicinanze di questa casa vacanze potrete praticare l’escursionismo.

hotels.name: Hyatt Place Murfreesboro
hotels.description_fr:
L’établissement Hyatt Place Murfreesboro se trouve à Murfreesboro, à 44 km de ce lieu d’intérêt : Lane Motor Museum. Il propose une piscine extérieure ouverte en saison, une salle de sport, un restaurant et un parking privé gratuit. Cet hôtel 3 étoiles propose un bar ainsi que des hébergements dotés de la climatisation, d’une connexion Wi-Fi gratuite et d’une salle de bains privative. Cet hôtel vous accueille à respectivement 48 km et 48 km de : Musée de Johnny Cash et Bridgestone Arena.

Les hébergements sont dotés d’une télévision à écran plat avec les chaînes du câble et d’un coffre-fort. Certains hébergements comprennent une kitchenette équipée d’un lave-vaisselle et d’un micro-ondes. Des serviettes et du linge de lit sont fournis.
hotels.description_en:
Comfortable Accommodations: Hyatt Place Murfreesboro in Murfreesboro offers rooms with air-conditioning, private bathrooms, and modern amenities. Guests enjoy free WiFi, streaming services, and comfortable sofa beds.
Dining and Leisure: The family-friendly restaurant serves American cuisine with vegetarian, vegan, gluten-free, and dairy-free options. Additional facilities include a fitness centre, seasonal outdoor swimming pool, and bar.
Convenient Location: Located 41 km from Nashville International Airport, the hotel is near attractions such as Lane Motor Museum (44 km) and Nashville Zoo (40 km). Free on-site private parking is available.
Guest Satisfaction: Highly rated for room cleanliness, breakfast provided by the property, and room comfort.
hotels.description_es:

Este hotel de 3 estrellas ofrece bar y habitaciones con aire acondicionado, wifi gratis y baño privado. Museo Johnny Cash está a 48 km del hotel y Bridgestone Arena, a 48 km.

Las habitaciones de este alojamiento incluyen TV de pantalla plana con canales por cable y caja fuerte. Algunas habitaciones también están equipadas con zona de cocina con lavavajillas y microondas. En el hotel, cada habitación tiene ropa de cama y toallas.

La clientela puede practicar actividades en Murfreesboro y alrededores, como ciclismo.

Os hóspedes de Hyatt Place Murfreesboro poderão desfrutar de atividades em Murfreesboro e arredores, como ciclismo.

Cet hôtel 3 étoiles propose une connexion Wi-Fi gratuite, un restaurant et un bar. Cet hôtel propose un barbecue et une réception ouverte 24h/24.

hotels.name: Holiday Inn Express & Suites Meridian I-20 by IHG
hotels.description_fr:
L'établissement Holiday Inn Express & Suites Meridian I-20 by IHG se situe à Meridian. Cet hôtel 2 étoiles propose une salle de sport ainsi que des hébergements dotés de la climatisation, d’une connexion Wi-Fi gratuite et d’une salle de bains privative.

Les hébergements sont pourvus d’un coin salon, d’une télévision à écran plat et d’un coffre-fort. Des serviettes et du linge de lit sont fournis.

L’établissement Holiday Inn Express & Suites Meridian I-20 by IHG sert un petit-déjeuner buffet ou continental.

L’établissement dispose d’un parking privé gratuit, d’un centre d’affaires, ainsi que d’une réception ouverte 24h/24.

hotels.description_en:
Comfortable Accommodations: Holiday Inn Express & Suites Meridian I-20 by IHG in Meridian offers air-conditioned rooms with private bathrooms, work desks, and free WiFi. Each room includes a refrigerator, microwave, TV, and wardrobe.
Facilities and Services: Guests can enjoy a fitness centre, outdoor fireplace, and outdoor seating area. Additional amenities include a business area, electric vehicle charging station, bicycle parking, and free on-site private parking.
Breakfast and Dining: A continental buffet breakfast is served daily, featuring warm dishes, fresh pastries, pancakes, cheese, fruits, and juice.
Location and Access: Located 7 km from Meridian Regional Airport, the hotel provides a 24-hour front desk, daily housekeeping, and luggage storage.

hotels.name: Drury Inn & Suites Meridian
hotels.description_fr:
Le Drury Inn & Suites Meridian vous accueille à 6,4 km du parc et du centre commercial de Bonita Lakes, à Meridian dans le Mississippi. Vous pourrez commencer chaque journée avec un petit-déjeuner chaud. De la nourriture et des boissons sont disponibles le soir à la réception.

Toutes les chambres du Meridian Drury Inn and Suites comportent une connexion Wi-Fi gratuite, une télévision par câble à écran plat, un four micro-ondes et un petit réfrigérateur.

Le Drury Inn & Suites Meridian met à votre disposition un centre d'affaires, une salle de réunion, une salle de sport et une piscine sur place.

Le musée Jimmie Rodgers, hommage au musicien du pays James Rodgers, est accessible à 11,2 km. L'établissement se situe à 9,6 km du musée Meridian of Art et du grand opéra Riley Center.
hotels.description_en:
Bonita Lakes Park and Bonita Lakes Mall are 4 miles from this Meridian, Mississippi hotel. Guests can start every day with a hot breakfast and enjoy a nightly food and beverage reception.

Free Wi-Fi, a flat-screen cable TV, and microwave are featured in all rooms. A small refrigerator is also provided at this Meridian Drury Inn and Suites.

An on-site business centre, meeting facilities, and a fitness centre are offered by Drury Inn and Suites Meridian. A swimming pool is on site.

The Jimmie Rodgers Museum, a tribute to country musician James Rodgers, is 7 miles away. Guests will be within 6 miles from the Meridian Museum of Art and the Riley Center grand opera house.

Couples particularly like the location — they rated it 9.3 for a two-person trip.
hotels.description_es:
Este hotel de Meridian, Misisipi, está situado a 6,4 km del parque Bonita Lakes y del centro comercial. Sirve un desayuno caliente diario y dispone de comida y bebida en recepción durante la noche.

Todas las habitaciones del Meridian Drury Inn and Suites incluyen conexión Wi-Fi gratuita, TV por cable de pantalla plana, microondas y nevera pequeña.

El Drury Inn and Suites Meridian alberga piscina, salas para reuniones, un centro de negocios y un centro de fitness.

Está situado a 11,2 km del Museo Jimmie Rodgers, dedicado al cantante de country James Rodgers, y a 9,6 km del Museo de Arte de Meridian y de la gran ópera de Riley Center.

A las parejas les encanta la ubicación — Le han puesto un 9,3 para viajes de dos personas.
hotels.description_pt:

Todos os quartos incluem acesso Wi-Fi gratuito, uma televisão de ecrã plano por cabo e um micro-ondas. Um pequeno frigorífico também é fornecido no Meridian Drury Inn and Suites.

O Drury Inn and Suites Meridian disponibiliza um centro de negócios no local, comodidades para reuniões e um centro de fitness. Existe uma piscina no local.

O Museu Jimmie Rodgers, um tributo dos músicos de James Rodgers, fica a 11 km. Os hóspedes estarão a cerca de 9,6 km do Meridian Museum of Art (museu) e do Riley Center (ópera).
hotels.description_it:
Ubicato a Meridian, Mississippi, a 4 km dal Bonita Lakes Park e dal centro commerciale Bonita Lakes Mall, questo hotel propone ogni giorno una prima colazione calda, e un'accoglienza serale a base di cibo e bevande.

Le camere del Meridian Drury Inn and Suites dispongono di WiFi gratuito, TV a schermo piatto, forno a microonde e piccolo frigorifero.

Al Drury Inn and Suites Meridian troverete un centro business, dei servizi riunioni, una palestra e una piscina in loco.

La struttura sorge a 11 km dal Jimmie Rodgers Museum, un omaggio al musicista country James Rodgers, e a 9,6 km dal Meridian Museum of Art e dal Riley Center grand opera house.

Le coppie apprezzano molto la posizione: l'hanno valutata 9,3 per un viaggio a due.
